content: pyproj latest stable is 3.7.2. Wraps PROJ C library; Geod class offers inv() (forward/back azimuth + distance), line_lengths(), npts() for intermediate points, polygon_area_perimeter(). Depends on bundled PROJ data files (proj.db) and compiled binary wheels -- heavier dependency than geographiclib and known to cause PyInstaller packaging pain (missing proj.db / PROJ_LIB env var / DLL load failures) requiring manual spec-file hooks.
